reviews.comment:
La atención regular,siempre hay que esperar,y no hace la diferencia,el medio de pago,ya nos tenemos que mentalizar que el pago es electrónico, quien maneja los hilos,que no permiten abrir otra estación,fuera te temporada es igual o peor.

(Translated by Google)
The service is regular, you always have to wait, and it doesn't make a difference. As for the payment method, we have to accept that payment is electronic. Who's pulling the strings that prevents them from opening another station? Out of season it's the same or worse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBeGVlei1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de la señora del minimercado, 20 minutos para esperar para comprar UNA ficha para el aire , un desastre , pongan a alguien que quiera laburar y que sea eficiente

Terrible service from the lady at the minimarket, 20 minutes to wait to buy ONE token for the air conditioner, a disaster, hire someone who wants to work and is efficient
